LanguageData.Ammo_127x108mm_FMJ.label: 12.7x108mm (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_127x108mm_FMJ.description: Large caliber bullet used by many heavy machine guns and anti-materiel rifles.

LanguageData.Ammo_127x40mm_FMJ.label: 12.7x40mm cartridge (FMJ)
LanguageData.Ammo_127x40mm_FMJ.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. Commonly used by UNSC magnum pistols.
LanguageData.Ammo_127x40mm_AP.label: 12.7x40mm cartridge (AP)
LanguageData.Ammo_127x40mm_AP.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. Commonly used by UNSC magnum pistols.

LanguageData.Ammo_127x40mm_HP.description: This high-powered cartridge is one of the largest calibers found in handguns. Commonly used by UNSC magnum pistols.
